title: saelanthus ternatus
intro: Saelanthus ternatus, also known as the "Gynura" plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Saelanthus ternatus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
